scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ocos/contracts && npm run build --workspace @ocos/web && npm run build --workspace @ocos/worker && npm run build --workspace @ocos/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @ocos/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @ocos/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @ocos/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @ocos/cli
